sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110901" key="filaxaio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φιλ-ᾰχαιός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n110901.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">friend of the Achaeans,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:228" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.228</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
